ValidationRule.description: This validation rule restricts users from modifying Invoice Date, Due Date, Amount, and Total Amount once the Status changes from Draft.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND ( ISPICKVAL (mfg_Status__c, "Draft") = FALSE, OR ( ISCHANGED (mfg_Invoice_Date__c), ISCHANGED (mfg_Due_Date__c), ISCHANGED (mfg_Amount__c), ISCHANGED (mfg_Total_Amount__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: These fields (Invoice Date, Due Date, Amount, and Total Amount) cannot be edited.
